angle.name: Relaunch
angle.headline: You're reopening — launch loud, not quiet.
opening_lines: A relaunch is the one moment the whole town is ready to look at you again — most places waste it on a single Facebook post.
Everything here is already built: the site can carry your reopening date, new menu and location the day you announce.
Start fresh on day one — new brand, new site, socials rebuilt — instead of dragging the old page's silence behind you.
rep_notes: Confirm the new trading name, location and reopening date before quoting.
If the brand is changing, the free build covers the rebrand — say so early, it lands.

gap_summary.label: No real website
gap_summary.sell_line: Right now anyone who Googles you finds nothing you control — 3 of your local rivals have a site doing that job for them.

gap_summary.label: No online menu / services list
gap_summary.sell_line: People check the menu before they ever walk in — if they can't see it, they pick somewhere they can.

gap_summary.label: No branded email
gap_summary.sell_line: A business running on a personal Gmail or Facebook messages looks temporary — a branded address fixes that overnight.

gap_summary.label: Social posting is irregular
gap_summary.sell_line: Your page goes quiet for weeks at a time — quiet pages read as closed, and the algorithm buries them.

gap_summary.label: Great reviews nobody sees
gap_summary.sell_line: You've earned reviews that sit buried on other people's platforms — put them where every visitor sees them in the first five seconds.

gap_summary.label: Look and photos aging
gap_summary.sell_line: Photos and pages age faster than people think — an annual refresh keeps you looking like the newest place in town.

rungs.name: Online Foundation
includes: Hosting on managed infrastructure, SSL, daily backups
Maintenance and content edits (hours, prices, photos)
gifts: Hand-crafted website — built free, yours while hosted

rungs.name: Social Launch
includes: First promotional campaign, designed and posted

rungs.name: Social Growth
includes: Everything in Social Launch, at 8 posts/month
Monthly performance summary in plain English
gifts: Live review widget on the website

rungs.name: Social Pro
includes: Daily-cadence content, stories and reels included
Ad campaign setup and management (ad spend separate)

rungs.name: Competitor Watch
includes: Continuous monitoring of your named local rivals
3 attack campaigns per year, timed to rival weaknesses

rungs.name: Seasonal Push
includes: 3 seasonal campaigns per year (local calendar aware)

rungs.name: Annual Upscale
includes: Full site + socials refresh once a year: new photos, copy, design pass

tiers.name: Foundation
tiers.pitch_line: Get found, look professional, own your own corner of the internet.

tiers.name: Presence
tiers.pitch_line: Foundation plus your socials rebuilt and run for you.

tiers.name: Growth
tiers.pitch_line: Serious cadence, reviews worked for you, seasonal pushes on the calendar.

tiers.name: Dominate
tiers.pitch_line: Everything, plus we watch your rivals and hit back three times a year.
